name: Favorite Blueberry Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup fresh or thawed blueberries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the dry ingredients.
2. Combine the egg, milk, and salad oil; stir in until just moistened.
3. Cook on a hot griddle.
4. When the undersides of the pancakes are nicely browned, sprinkle about 2 tablespoons of drained blueberries over each pancake.
5. Flip to cook the other side. Makes about 12 dollar-size or eight 4-inch size pancakes.
